summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NaijaFinance bug fixes. Both bug fixes verified working correctly: (1) Loan approval now creates active Loan records with proper interest rate and monthly payment calculations, (2) Tab colors on Savings and Loans pages show light gray for inactive tabs (NOT yellow). Full loan lifecycle tested end-to-end.

issues: Missing aria-describedby warning in console for DialogContent - minor accessibility improvement

seed_data_creation: Created test customer TEST_LoanCustomer_* and loan application during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes verified. Loan approval creates Loan records properly. Tab colors use proper HSL format and render as light gray (inactive) / green (active). Test data created includes customers prefixed with TEST_.

bug_fix_1_loan_repayment.description: Record Loan Repayment form dropdown shows active loans with outstanding balances
bug_fix_1_loan_repayment.evidence: Dropdown showed LN00000001 (₦98,309.97 outstanding) and LN00000002 (₦47,210.14 outstanding)

bug_fix_2_tab_colors.description: Inactive tab color is light gray (rgba(0,0,0,0) transparent bg with gray text), NOT yellow
bug_fix_2_tab_colors.evidence: Tab backgrounds: active=rgb(6,78,59) green, inactive=rgba(0,0,0,0) transparent with rgb(100,116,139) gray text

loan_approval_flow.description: Approving pending application creates active Loan record with proper interest rate (15%) and monthly payment calculation
loan_approval_flow.evidence: Approved LOAN000002 (₦600,000) -> Created LN00000003 with monthly payment ₦54,154.99

features_tested: Loans page - Tab switching and colors
Loans page - Record Repayment dialog with loan dropdown
Savings page - Tab switching and colors
Full loan lifecycle: create application -> approve -> verify active loan creation
